tagline: Pool Leak Detection, Repair & Renovation in Sarasota FL

hero.headline:
We Find Leaks Others Can't
Even Detect
hero.subheadline: For over 21 years, Nelson Pool Company has been Sarasota's trusted name in pool leak detection, repair, and renovation. Family-owned and backed by a 4.9-star reputation, we combine cutting-edge technology with old-school craftsmanship so your pool stays watertight and beautiful.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Leak Detection to Complete<br class="hidden md:block">Pool Transformation
services.subtitle: From pinpointing hidden leaks to full-scale renovations, Nelson Pool Company delivers the specialized expertise Sarasota pool owners trust most.

cards.title: Pool Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced technology and 21 years of experience help us find leaks that other companies miss. Visual evaluation, pressure testing, and electronic detection — we leave nothing to chance.

cards.title: Pool Leak Repair
cards.description: Once we find the leak, we fix it right. Structural, plumbing, and pressure-side repairs completed with precision so the problem stays solved permanently.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Premium replastering with Krystal Krete, Stone Scape, and Pebble Tec finishes. Our crews are leading specialists in restoring your pool surface to like-new condition.

cards.title: Complete Pool Renovation
cards.description: From tile and coping to waterfalls, spas, and full redesigns — we transform tired pools into stunning backyard retreats that feel brand new.

cards.title: Equipment & Automation
cards.description: Energy-efficient pumps, filters, heaters, LED lighting, saltwater systems, and pool automation upgrades that save you money and simplify pool care.

cards.title: Deck Pavers & Travertine
cards.description: Professional installation of pavers, travertine, and concrete decking that elevates your pool area's look, safety, and long-term durability.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us What's Going On
steps.description: Describe the issue — a suspected leak, aging surface, or renovation idea. We schedule a thorough evaluation at your convenience and provide everything in writing.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Plan
steps.description: Owner Anthony Wilson personally oversees the inspection. We identify the problem, present honest options, and give you a transparent quote with no hidden costs.

steps.title: Expert Repair, Lasting Results
steps.description: Our skilled crews handle the work while Anthony checks every detail. You get a pool that looks great, holds water, and stays that way for years to come.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Nelson Pool
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated, and Built on Integrity
about.description: Founded in 2005 by Nelson Inda and now led by Anthony and Jayme Wilson, Nelson Pool Company has spent over two decades earning our reputation one pool at a time. Anthony personally oversees every project — from initial inspection to final walkthrough — because we believe that is the only way to guarantee the quality Sarasota families deserve. With a 4.9-star Google rating, BBB A+ accreditation, and hundreds of satisfied customers across Sarasota and Manatee counties, our track record speaks for itself.

features.title: Owner on Every Job Site
features.description: Anthony Wilson personally checks crew work on every project, ensuring the craftsmanship meets our exacting standards.

features.title: Transparent, Written Estimates
features.description: Everything is provided in writing — scope, cost, and timeline. No confusion, no surprises, no fine print.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated Since 2017
features.description: Accredited with the Better Business Bureau at the highest rating for seven consecutive years, reflecting our commitment to doing right by every customer.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is provided in writing with a clear scope, timeline, and cost. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest pricing from a company that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Leak-Free or We Come Back" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If a leak we repaired resurfaces or any work does not meet the standard we promised, we will return and make it right at no additional cost. We have built our 21-year reputation on standing behind every job, and we are not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How do you detect pool leaks?
faqs.answer: We start with a thorough visual evaluation, then use advanced electronic detection equipment and pressure testing to pinpoint the exact source. Our 21 years of experience mean we find leaks that other companies have missed — including structural, plumbing, and pressure-side leaks.

faqs.question: How long does a pool renovation take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary depending on scope. A resurfacing typically takes 5-7 days, while a full renovation with tile, coping, and equipment may take 2-4 weeks. We provide a written timeline upfront so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold Florida Certified Pool/Spa Contractor License CPC1460487, State Contractors License #1459347, and carry full insurance. We are also BBB Accredited with an A+ rating since 2017 and ranked in the top 20% of Florida contractors by BuildZoom.

faqs.question: What resurfacing materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We work with premium finishes including Krystal Krete, Stone Scape, and Pebble Tec. During your consultation, we help you choose the best material for your budget, aesthetic preference, and long-term durability goals.

faqs.question: What if another company couldn't find my leak?
faqs.answer: That is actually one of our specialties. Many clients come to us after other companies failed to locate their leak. Our advanced detection methods and two decades of hands-on experience allow us to find what others miss.

testimonials.name: Idan M.
testimonials.text: Nelson Pool Company did an amazing job. They found a leak that two other companies couldn't figure out. Highly recommend their leak detection services.

testimonials.name: EJ Remorta
testimonials.text: We felt confident that we were in capable hands from the initial design consultation to the final walkthrough. The results exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Natasha D.
testimonials.text: Anthony and Thea were fantastic to work with — professional, friendly, and always available to answer questions. Our renovated pool looks incredible.
